parameters.name: filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: A filter string following JSONPath syntax that will be used to filter the input JSON.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Select the output of the JSON .

parameters.name: holdlast
parameters.label: Hold Last Non-Empty Results
parameters.description: When enabled, the most recent result will be held if the results become empty, in effect only new non-empty results will update the output.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
